aria-hidden="true"><path d="m6 9 6 6 6-6"></path></svg></button></div></div><p class="mb-2 text-lg text-fd-muted-foreground">This page gives an overview of all available Prisma CLI commands, explains their options and shows numerous usage examples.</p><div class="prose flex-1"><p>This document describes the Prisma CLI commands, arguments, and options.</p>
<h2 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="commands"><a data-card="" href="#commands" class="peer">Commands</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h2>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="version--v"><a data-card="" href="#version--v" class="peer"><code>version</code> (<code>-v</code>)</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p>The <code>version</code> command outputs information about your current <code>prisma</code> version, platform, and engine binaries.</p>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="options"><a data-card="" href="#options" class="peer">Options</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<p>The <code>version</code> command recognizes the following options to modify its behavior:</p>
<div class="relative w-full overflow-auto"><table class="w-full caption-bottom text-sm"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b"><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker">Option</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker">Required</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>--json</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">Outputs version information in JSON format.</td></tr></tbody></table></div>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="examples"><a data-card="" href="#examples" class="peer">Examples</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>

<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="init"><a data-card="" href="#init" class="peer"><code>init</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p>Bootstraps a fresh Prisma ORM project within the current directory.</p>
<p>The <code>init</code> command does not interpret any existing files. Instead, it creates a <code>prisma</code> directory containing a bare-bones <code>schema.prisma</code> file within your current directory.</p>
<p>By default, the project sets up a <a href="/docs/v6/postgres/database/local-development">local Prisma Postgres</a> instance but you can choose a different database using the <code>--datasource-provider</code> option.</p>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="arguments"><a data-card="" href="#arguments" class="peer">Arguments</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<div class="relative w-full overflow-auto"><table class="w-full caption-bottom text-sm"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b"><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker">Argument</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker">Required</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker">Description</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker">Default</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>--datasource-provider</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">Specifies the value for the <code>provider</code> field in the <code>datasource</code> block. Options are <code>prisma+postgres</code>, <code>sqlite</code>, <code>postgresql</code>, <code>mysql</code>, <code>sqlserver</code>, <code>mongodb</code> and <code>cockroachdb</code>.</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>postgresql</code></td></tr><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>--db</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">Shorthand syntax for <code>--datasource-provider prisma+postgres</code>; creates a new <a href="/docs/v6/postgres">Prisma Postgres</a> instance. Requires authentication in the <a href="https://console.prisma.io" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">PDP Console</a>.</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"></td></tr><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>--prompt</code> (or <code>--vibe</code>)</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">Scaffolds a Prisma schema based on the prompt and deploys it to a fresh Prisma Postgres instance. Requires authentication in the <a href="https://console.prisma.io" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">PDP Console</a>.</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>--generator-provider</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">Define the generator provider to use.</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>--preview-feature</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 To define multiple Preview features, you have to provide the flag multiple times for each Preview feature. See examples.</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"></td></tr><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>--output</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">Specifies the <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-client/setup-and-configuration/generating-prisma-client#using-a-custom-output-path">output location for the generated client</a>.</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>../generated/prisma</code></td></tr><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>--with-model</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">Adds a simple <code>User</code> model to the initial Prisma schema. Available since version <code>5.14.0</code>.</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"></td></tr></tbody></table></div>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="examples-1"><a data-card="" href="#examples-1" class="peer">Examples</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<p><strong>Run <code>prisma init</code></strong></p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">prisma</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> init</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span>npx prisma init</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>Initialized Prisma in your project</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>  prisma/</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>    schema.prisma</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>  prisma.config.ts</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>Next, choose how you want to set up your database:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>CONNECT EXISTING DATABASE:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>  1. Configure your DATABASE_URL in `prisma.config.ts`</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>  2. Run `npx prisma db pull` to introspect your database.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>CREATE NEW DATABASE:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>  Local: npx prisma dev (runs Postgres locally in your terminal)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>  Cloud: npx create-db (creates a free Prisma Postgres database)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>  Then, define your models in `prisma/schema.prisma` and run `npx prisma migrate dev` to apply your schema.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>Learn more: https://pris.ly/getting-started</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<p>Next, run the <code>prisma dev</code> command to interact with your local Prisma Postgres instance (e.g. to run migrations or execute queries).</p>
<p><strong>Run <code>prisma init --datasource-provider sqlite</code></strong></p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">prisma</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> init</span><span style="--shiki-light:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF"> --datasource-provider</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> sqlite</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<p>The command output contains helpful information on how to use the generated files and begin using Prisma ORM with your project.</p>
<p><strong>Run <code>prisma init --db</code></strong></p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">prisma</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> init</span><span style="--shiki-light:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF"> --db</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span>✓ Select an authentication method Google</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>Authenticating to Prisma Platform via browser.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>Visit the following URL in your browser to authenticate:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>https://console.prisma.io/auth/cli?state=eyJjb6ll...</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>Successfully authenticated as amanyoyoyo@gmail.com.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>Let&#x27;s set up your Prisma Postgres database!</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>✓ Select your region: ap-southeast-1 - Asia Pacific (Singapore)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>✓ Enter a project name: My Prisma Project</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>✓ Success! Your Prisma Postgres database is ready ✅</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>We found an existing schema.prisma file in your current project directory.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>--- Database URL ---</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>Connect Prisma ORM to your Prisma Postgres database with this URL:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>--- Next steps ---</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>Go to https://pris.ly/ppg-init for detailed instructions.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>1. Install the Postgres adapter</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>npm install @prisma/adapter-pg</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>...and add it to your Prisma Client instance:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>import { PrismaClient } from &quot;./generated/prisma/client&quot;;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>import { PrismaPg } from &quot;@prisma/adapter-pg&quot;;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>const connectionString = `${process.env.DATABASE_URL}`;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>const adapter = new PrismaPg({ connectionString });</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>const prisma = new PrismaClient({ adapter });</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>2. Apply migrations</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>Run the following command to create and apply a migration:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>npx prisma migrate dev</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>3. Manage your data</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>View and edit your data locally by running this command:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>npx prisma studio</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>...or online in Console:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>https://console.prisma.io/cmhyn0uwl0q6903foel16ff31/cmhyn143t074tyLfoezs684ag/cmhyn143t074uylfon8hfre5z/studio</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>4. Send queries from your app</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>If you already have an existing app with Prisma ORM, you can now run it and it will send queries against your newly created Prisma Postgres instance.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>5. Learn more</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>For more info, visit the Prisma Postgres docs: https://pris.ly/ppg-docs</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<p>The command creates a new <a href="https://www.prisma.io/postgres" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">Prisma Postgres</a> instance. Note that it requires you to be authenticated with the <a href="https://console.prisma.io" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">PDP Console</a>, If you run it for the first time without being authenticated, the command will open the browser for you to log into Console.</p>
<p><strong>Run <code>prisma init --prompt &quot;Simple habit tracker application&quot;</code></strong></p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">prisma</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> init</span><span style="--shiki-light:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF"> --prompt</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> &quot;Simple habit tracker application&quot;</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<p>The command scaffolds a Prisma schema and deploys it to a fresh <a href="https://www.prisma.io/postgres" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">Prisma Postgres</a> instance. Note that it requires you to be authenticated with the <a href="https://console.prisma.io" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">PDP Console</a>, If you run it for the first time without being authenticated, the command will open the browser for you to log into Console.</p>
<p><strong>Run <code>prisma init --preview-feature</code></strong></p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">prisma</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> init</span><span style="--shiki-light:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF"> --preview-feature</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> metrics</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>

<p><strong><code>prisma.config.ts</code></strong></p>
<p>A TypeScript configuration file for Prisma that defines your datasource URL and other settings:</p>

<p><strong><code>.env</code></strong></p>
<p>A file to define environment variables for your project:</p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6A737D;--shiki-dark:#6A737D"># Environment variables declared in this file are automatically made available to Prisma.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6A737D;--shiki-dark:#6A737D"># See the documentation for more detail: https://pris.ly/d/prisma-schema#using-environment-variables</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6A737D;--shiki-dark:#6A737D"># Prisma supports the native connection string format for PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, SQL Server, MongoDB and CockroachDB.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6A737D;--shiki-dark:#6A737D"># See the documentation for all the connection string options: https://pris.ly/d/connection-strings</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">DATABASE_URL</span><span style="--shiki-light:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF">&quot;postgresql://user:password@localhost:5432/mydb&quot;</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<p><strong><code>.gitignore</code></strong></p>
<p>A file to specify what folders/files git should ignore in your project.</p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">node_modules</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6A737D;--shiki-dark:#6A737D"># Keep environment variables out of version control</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">.env</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">/generated/prisma</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<p><strong>Run <code>prisma init --url mysql://user:password@localhost:3306/mydb</code></strong></p>
<p>The <code>init</code> command with the <code>--url</code> argument allows you to specify a custom datasource URL during Prisma initialization, instead of relying on a placeholder database URL:</p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">prisma</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> init</span><span style="--shiki-light:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF"> --url</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> mysql://user:password@localhost:3306/mydb</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="generated-assets-1"><a data-card="" href="#generated-assets-1" class="peer">Generated Assets</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<p><strong><code>prisma/schema.prisma</code></strong></p>
<p>A minimal <code>schema.prisma</code> file to define your schema in:</p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6A737D;--shiki-dark:#6A737D">// This is your Prisma schema file,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6A737D;--shiki-dark:#6A737D">// learn more about it in the docs: https://pris.ly/d/prisma-schema</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">datasource</span><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0"> db</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">  provider </span><span style="--shiki-light:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> &quot;mysql&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">}</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">generator</span><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0"> client</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">  provider </span><span style="--shiki-light:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> &quot;prisma-client&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">  output   </span><span style="--shiki-light:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> &quot;../generated/prisma&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">}</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<p><strong><code>prisma.config.ts</code></strong></p>
<p>A TypeScript configuration file for Prisma with the custom URL:</p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">import</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8"> { defineConfig, env } </span><span style="--shiki-light:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">from</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> &quot;prisma/config&quot;</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">;</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">export</span><span style="--shiki-light:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583"> default</span><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0"> defineConfig</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">({</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">  schema: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF">&quot;prisma/schema.prisma&quot;</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">  migrations: {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">    path: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF">&quot;prisma/migrations&quot;</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">  },</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">  datasource: {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">    url: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">env</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF">&quot;DATABASE_URL&quot;</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">),</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">  },</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">});</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<p><strong><code>.env</code></strong></p>
<p>A file to define environment variables for your project:</p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span># Environment variables declared in this file are automatically made available to Prisma.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span># See the documentation for more detail: https://pris.ly/d/prisma-schema#using-environment-variables</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span># Prisma supports the native connection string format for PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, SQL Server, MongoDB and CockroachDB.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span># See the documentation for all the connection string options: https://pris.ly/d/connection-strings</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>DATABASE_URL=&quot;mysql://user:password@localhost:3306/mydb&quot;</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="generate"><a data-card="" href="#generate" class="peer"><code>generate</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p>The <code>generate</code> command generates assets like Prisma Client based on the <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-schema/overview/generators"><code>generator</code></a> and <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-schema/data-model/models"><code>data model</code></a> blocks defined in your <code>prisma/schema.prisma</code> file.</p>
<p>The <code>generate</code> command is most often used to generate Prisma Client with the <code>prisma-client</code> generator. This does the following:</p>
<ol>
<li>Inspects the current directory to find a Prisma Schema to process.</li>
<li>Generates a customized Prisma Client based on your schema into the output directory specified in the generator block.</li>
</ol>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="prerequisites"><a data-card="" href="#prerequisites" class="peer">Prerequisites</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<p>To use the <code>generate</code> command, you must add a generator definition in your <code>schema.prisma</code> file. The <code>prisma-client</code> generator, used to generate Prisma Client, can be added by including the following in your <code>schema.prisma</code> file:</p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">generator</span><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0"> client</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">  provider </span><span style="--shiki-light:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> &quot;prisma-client&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">  output   </span><span style="--shiki-light:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> &quot;./generated&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">}</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="options-1"><a data-card="" href="#options-1" class="peer">Options</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<div class="relative w-full overflow-auto"><table class="w-full caption-bottom text-sm"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b"><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker">Option</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker">Required</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker">Description</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker">Default</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>--data-proxy</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">The <code>generate</code> command will generate Prisma Client for use with <a href="/docs/v6/accelerate">Prisma Accelerate</a> prior to Prisma 5.0.0. Mutually exclusive with <code>--accelerate</code> and <code>--no-engine</code>.</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"></td></tr><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>--accelerate</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">The <code>generate</code> command will generate Prisma Client for use with <a href="/docs/v6/accelerate">Prisma Accelerate</a>. Mutually exclusive with <code>--data-proxy</code> and <code>--no-engine</code>. Available in Prisma 5.1.0 and later.</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"></td></tr><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>--no-engine</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">The <code>generate</code> command will generate Prisma Client without an accompanied engine for use with <a href="/docs/v6/accelerate">Prisma Accelerate</a>. Mutually exclusive with <code>--data-proxy</code> and <code>--accelerate</code>. Available in Prisma ORM 5.2.0 and later.</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"></td></tr><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>--no-hints</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">The <code>generate</code> command will generate Prisma Client without usage hints, surveys or info banners being printed to the terminal. Available in Prisma ORM 5.16.0 and later.</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"></td></tr><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>--allow-no-models</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">The <code>generate</code> command will generate Prisma Client without generating any models.</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"></td></tr><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>--watch</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">The <code>generate</code> command will continue to watch the <code>schema.prisma</code> file and re-generate Prisma Client on file changes.</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"></td></tr></tbody></table></div>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-warning border-none text-foreground-warning [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-warning"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p><strong>Deprecation Warning</strong></p><p>As of Prisma 5.2.0, <code>--data-proxy</code> and <code>--accelerate</code> are deprecated in favor of <code>--no-engine</code> as Prisma Client no longer requires an option to work with Prisma Accelerate. All options are available and work similarly, but we recommend <code>--no-engine</code> as it prevents an engine from being downloaded which will greatly impact the size of apps deployed to serverless and edge functions.</p></div></div>

<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>You can now start using Prisma Client in your code:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>

<span class="line"><span>// or const { PrismaClient } = require(&#x27;@prisma/client&#x27;)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>const prisma = new PrismaClient()</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>

<h5 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="generate-prisma-client-using-a-non-default-schemaprisma-path"><a data-card="" href="#generate-prisma-client-using-a-non-default-schemaprisma-path" class="peer">Generate Prisma Client using a non-default <code>schema.prisma</code> path</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h5>

<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="generated-assets-2"><a data-card="" href="#generated-assets-2" class="peer">Generated Assets</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<p>The <code>prisma-client</code> generator creates a customized client for working with your database in a custom output directory specified by the <code>output</code> field - you can <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-client/setup-and-configuration/generating-prisma-client#using-a-custom-output-path">customize the output folder</a>.</p>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="validate"><a data-card="" href="#validate" class="peer"><code>validate</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p>Validates the <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-schema/overview">Prisma Schema Language</a> of the Prisma schema file.</p>

<div class="relative w-full overflow-auto"><table class="w-full caption-bottom text-sm"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b"><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker">Argument</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker">Required</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker">Description</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker">Default</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>--schema</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">Specifies the path to the desired <code>schema.prisma</code> file to be processed instead of the default path. Both absolute and relative paths are supported.</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>./schema.prisma</code>, <code>./prisma/schema.prisma</code></td></tr></tbody></table></div>

<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="format"><a data-card="" href="#format" class="peer"><code>format</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p>Formats the Prisma schema file, which includes validating, formatting, and persisting the schema.</p>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="arguments-3"><a data-card="" href="#arguments-3" class="peer">Arguments</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>

Both absolute and relative paths are supported.</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>./schema.prisma</code>, <code>./prisma/schema.prisma</code></td></tr><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>--check</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">Fails if any files are unformatted. <figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span>-- Prisma schema --</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>Path: /prisma/schema.prisma</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>-- Local cache directory for engines files --</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>Path: /.cache/prisma</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>-- Environment variables --</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>When not set, the line is dimmed and no value is displayed.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>When set, the line is bold and the value is inside the `` backticks.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>For general debugging</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - CI:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - DEBUG:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - NODE_ENV:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - RUST_LOG:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - RUST_BACKTRACE:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - NO_COLOR:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - TERM: `xterm-256color`</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - NO_PROXY:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - http_proxy:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - HTTP_PROXY:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - https_proxy:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - HTTPS_PROXY:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>For more information see our [environment variable documentation](/v6/orm/reference/environment-variables-reference)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>For hiding messages</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - PRISMA_DISABLE_WARNINGS:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - PRISMA_HIDE_PREVIEW_FLAG_WARNINGS:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - PRISMA_HIDE_UPDATE_MESSAGE:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>For downloading engines</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - PRISMA_ENGINES_MIRROR:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - PRISMA_BINARIES_MIRROR (deprecated):</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - PRISMA_ENGINES_CHECKSUM_IGNORE_MISSING:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - BINARY_DOWNLOAD_VERSION:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>For configuring the Query Engine Type</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - PRISMA_CLI_QUERY_ENGINE_TYPE: (Not supported in Prisma ORM v7)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - PRISMA_CLIENT_ENGINE_TYPE: (Not supported in Prisma ORM v7)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>For custom engines</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - PRISMA_QUERY_ENGINE_BINARY: (Not supported in Prisma ORM v7)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - PRISMA_QUERY_ENGINE_LIBRARY: (Not supported in Prisma ORM v7)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - PRISMA_SCHEMA_ENGINE_BINARY:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - PRISMA_MIGRATION_ENGINE_BINARY:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>For the &quot;postinstall&quot; npm hook</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - PRISMA_GENERATE_SKIP_AUTOINSTALL: (Not supported in Prisma ORM v7)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - PRISMA_SKIP_POSTINSTALL_GENERATE: (Not supported in Prisma ORM v7)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - PRISMA_GENERATE_IN_POSTINSTALL: (Not supported in Prisma ORM v7)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>For &quot;prisma generate&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - PRISMA_GENERATE_DATAPROXY: (Not supported in Prisma ORM v7)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - PRISMA_GENERATE_NO_ENGINE: (Not supported in Prisma ORM v7)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>For Prisma Client</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - PRISMA_SHOW_ALL_TRACES:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - PRISMA_CLIENT_NO_RETRY (Binary engine only): (Not supported in Prisma ORM v7)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>For Prisma Migrate</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - PRISMA_SCHEMA_DISABLE_ADVISORY_LOCK:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - PRISMA_MIGRATE_SKIP_GENERATE: (Not supported in Prisma ORM v7)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - PRISMA_MIGRATE_SKIP_SEED: (Not supported in Prisma ORM v7)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>For Prisma Studio</span></span>
<span class="line"><span> - BROWSER:</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>-- Terminal is interactive? --</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>true</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>-- CI detected? --</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>false</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<p>If you&#x27;re using an older version of Prisma, you can use this command by running:</p>

<h2 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="dev"><a data-card="" href="#dev" class="peer"><code>dev</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h2>
<p>The <code>dev</code> command starts a <a href="/docs/v6/postgres/database/local-development">local Prisma Postgres</a> database that you can run Prisma ORM commands against. It is useful for development and testing purposes and also allows you to switch to <a href="/docs/v6/postgres">Prisma Postgres</a> in production easily.</p>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="arguments-5"><a data-card="" href="#arguments-5" class="peer">Arguments</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>

<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="examples-5"><a data-card="" href="#examples-5" class="peer">Examples</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
