<p>This creates a named instance called <code>mydbname</code> that you can later start, stop, or manage using the instance management commands.</p>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="dev-start"><a data-card="" href="#dev-start" class="peer"><code>dev start</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p>Starts existing <a href="/docs/v6/postgres/database/local-development">local Prisma Postgres</a> instances in the background.</p>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-ppg text-foreground-ppg border-none [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-ppg"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p>This command only works with instances that already exist.</p></div></div>

<p><code>&lt;glob&gt;</code> is a placeholder for a glob pattern to specify which local Prisma Postgres instances should be started, for example:</p>
<div dir="ltr" data-orientation="horizontal" class="bg-background-default rounded-square border border-stroke-neutral overflow-hidden my-4"><div role="tablist" aria-orientation="horizontal" <p>This enables background instance management outside of the VS Code extension.</p>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="dev-ls"><a data-card="" href="#dev-ls" class="peer"><code>dev ls</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>

<p>This command shows all instances on your system with their current status and configuration.</p>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="dev-stop"><a data-card="" href="#dev-stop" class="peer"><code>dev stop</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>

<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-ppg text-foreground-ppg border-none [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-ppg"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p>The <code>rm</code> command is interactive and includes safety prompts to prevent accidental data loss.</p></div></div>
<h2 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="db"><a data-card="" href="#db" class="peer"><code>db</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h2>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="db-pull"><a data-card="" href="#db-pull" class="peer"><code>db pull</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p>The <code>db pull</code> command connects to your database and adds Prisma models to your Prisma schema that reflect the current database schema.</p>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-warning border-none text-foreground-warning [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-warning"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p><strong>Warning</strong>: The command will overwrite the current <code>schema.prisma</code> file with the new schema. Some manual changes or customization can be lost. Be sure to back up your current <code>schema.prisma</code> file (or commit your current state to version control to be able to revert any changes) before running <code>db pull</code> if it contains important modifications.</p></div></div>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-ppg text-foreground-ppg border-none [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-ppg"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p>Introspection with the <code>db pull</code> command on the <a href="/docs/v6/orm/overview/databases/mongodb">MongoDB connector</a> samples the data instead of reading a schema.</p></div></div>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="prerequisites-1"><a data-card="" href="#prerequisites-1" class="peer">Prerequisites</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<p>Before using the <code>db pull</code> command, you must configure your database connection in your <code>prisma.config.ts</code> file.</p>
<p>For example:</p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="flex text-fd-muted-foreground items-center gap-2 h-9.5 border-b px-4"><div <h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="db-push"><a data-card="" href="#db-push" class="peer"><code>db push</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p>The <code>db push</code> command pushes the state of your Prisma schema to the database without using migrations. It creates the database if the database does not exist.</p>
<p>This command is a good choice when you do not need to version schema changes, such as during prototyping and local development.</p>
<p>See also:</p>
<ul>
<li><a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-migrate/workflows/prototyping-your-schema">Conceptual overview of <code>db push</code> and when to use it over Prisma Migrate</a></li>
<li><a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-migrate/workflows/prototyping-your-schema">Schema prototyping with <code>db push</code></a></li>
</ul>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="prerequisites-2"><a data-card="" href="#prerequisites-2" class="peer">Prerequisites</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<p>Before using the <code>db push</code> command, you must configure your database connection in your <code>prisma.config.ts</code> file.</p>
<p>For example:</p>

<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="options-3"><a data-card="" href="#options-3" class="peer">Options</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<div class="relative w-full overflow-auto"><table class="w-full caption-bottom text-sm"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b"><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker" style="text-align:left">Options</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker" style="text-align:left">Required</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker" style="text-align:left">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left"><code>--force-reset</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left">Resets the database and then updates the schema - useful if you need to start from scratch due to unexecutable migrations.</td></tr><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left"><code>--accept-data-loss</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left">Ignore data loss warnings. This option is required if as a result of making the schema changes, data may be lost.</td></tr><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left"><code>--help</code> / <code>--h</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left">Displays the help message</td></tr></tbody></table></div>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-warning border-none text-foreground-warning [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-warning"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p>The <code>--skip-generate</code> flag was removed in Prisma 7. <code>db push</code> no longer runs <code>prisma generate</code> automatically. Run it explicitly if needed.</p></div></div>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="arguments-7"><a data-card="" href="#arguments-7" class="peer">Arguments</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<div class="relative w-full overflow-auto"><table class="w-full caption-bottom text-sm"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b"><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker" style="text-align:left">Argument</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker" style="text-align:left">Required</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker" style="text-align:left">Description</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker" style="text-align:left">Default</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left"><code>--schema</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left">Specifies the path to the desired schema.prisma file to be processed instead of the default path. Both absolute and relative paths are supported.</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left"><code>./schema.prisma</code><br/> <code>./prisma/schema.prisma</code></td></tr></tbody></table></div>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="examples-7"><a data-card="" href="#examples-7" class="peer">Examples</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<p>Push the schema:</p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">prisma</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> db</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> push</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<p>Push the schema, accepting data loss:</p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">prisma</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> db</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> push</span><span style="--shiki-light:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF"> --accept-data-loss</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<p>Push the schema with a custom schema location:</p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">prisma</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> db</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> push</span><span style="--shiki-light:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF"> --schema=/tmp/schema.prisma</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="db-seed"><a data-card="" href="#db-seed" class="peer"><code>db seed</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p><code>db seed</code> changed from Preview to Generally Available (GA) in 3.0.1.</p>
<p>See <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-migrate/workflows/seeding">Seeding your database</a></p>

<div class="relative w-full overflow-auto"><table class="w-full caption-bottom text-sm"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b"><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker" style="text-align:left">Required</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left"><code>--help</code> / <p>The <code>--</code> argument/ <a href="https://pubs.opengroup.org/onlinepubs/9699919799/basedefs/V1_chap12.html#tag_12_02" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">delimiter</a>/ double-dash is available from version 4.15.0 or later.</p>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="examples-8"><a data-card="" href="#examples-8" class="peer">Examples</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">prisma</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> db</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> seed</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="db-execute"><a data-card="" href="#db-execute" class="peer"><code>db execute</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-ppg text-foreground-ppg border-none [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-ppg"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p>The <code>db execute</code> command is Generally Available in versions 3.13.0 and later. If you&#x27;re using a version between 3.9.0 and 3.13.0, it is available behind a <code>--preview-feature</code> CLI flag.</p></div></div>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-warning border-none text-foreground-warning [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-warning"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p>This command is currently not supported on <a href="/docs/v6/orm/overview/databases/mongodb">MongoDB</a>.</p></div></div>
<p>This command applies a SQL script to the database without interacting with the Prisma migrations table. The datasource URL configuration is read from the Prisma config file (e.g., <code>prisma.config.ts</code>).</p>
<p>The output of the command is connector-specific, and is not meant for returning data, but only to report success or failure.</p>
<p>See also:</p>
<ul>
<li><a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-migrate/workflows/patching-and-hotfixing#fixing-failed-migrations-with-migrate-diff-and-db-execute">Migration troubleshooting in production</a></li>
</ul>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="prerequisites-3"><a data-card="" href="#prerequisites-3" class="peer">Prerequisites</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<p>Before using the <code>db execute</code> command, you must configure your database connection in your <code>prisma.config.ts</code> file.</p>
<p>For example:</p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" <p>* Either <code>--file</code> or <code>--stdin</code> is required to provide the script input.</p>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-ppg text-foreground-ppg border-none [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-ppg"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p><strong>Prisma 7 breaking change</strong>: The <code>--schema</code> and <code>--url</code> options have been removed. Configure your database connection in <code>prisma.config.ts</code> instead.</p></div></div>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="examples-9"><a data-card="" href="#examples-9" class="peer">Examples</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Execute the content of a SQL script file using the datasource configured in <code>prisma.config.ts</code>:</p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">prisma</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> db</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> execute</span><span style="--shiki-light:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF"> --file</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> ./script.sql</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
</li>
<li>
<p>Execute the SQL script from stdin using the configured datasource:</p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" dev;&#x27;</span><span style="--shiki-light:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583"> |</span><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0"> prisma</span><span <h2 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="prisma-migrate"><a data-card="" href="#prisma-migrate" class="peer">Prisma Migrate</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h2>
<p>Prisma Migrate changed from Preview to Generally Available (GA) in 2.19.0.</p>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-ppg text-foreground-ppg border-none [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-ppg"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p><strong>Does not apply for MongoDB</strong> <br/>
Instead of <code>migrate dev</code> and related commands, <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-migrate/workflows/prototyping-your-schema"><code>db push</code></a> is used for <a href="/docs/v6/orm/overview/databases/mongodb">MongoDB</a>.</p></div></div>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="migrate-dev"><a data-card="" href="#migrate-dev" class="peer"><code>migrate dev</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p><strong>For use in development environments only, requires shadow database</strong></p>
<p>The <code>migrate dev</code> command:</p>
<ol>
<li>Reruns the existing migration history in the <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-migrate/understanding-prisma-migrate/shadow-database">shadow database</a> in order to detect schema drift (edited or deleted migration file, or a manual changes to the database schema)</li>
<li>Applies pending migrations to the shadow database (for example, new migrations created by colleagues)</li>
<li>Generates a new migration from any changes you made to the Prisma schema before running <code>migrate dev</code></li>
<li>Applies all unapplied migrations to the development database and updates the <code>_prisma_migrations</code> table</li>
</ol>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-warning border-none text-foreground-warning [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-warning"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p>This command is not supported on <a href="/docs/v6/orm/overview/databases/mongodb">MongoDB</a>. Use <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-migrate/workflows/prototyping-your-schema"><code>db push</code></a> instead.</p></div></div>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-ppg text-foreground-ppg border-none [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-ppg"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p><strong>Prisma 7</strong>: <code>migrate dev</code> no longer automatically triggers <code>prisma generate</code> or seed scripts. Run <code>prisma generate</code> explicitly if needed.</p></div></div>
<p>See also:</p>
<ul>
<li><a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-migrate/getting-started">Conceptual overview of Prisma Migrate</a></li>
<li><a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-migrate/getting-started">Developing with Prisma Migrate</a></li>
</ul>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="options-6"><a data-card="" href="#options-6" class="peer">Options</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<div class="relative w-full overflow-auto"><table class="w-full caption-bottom text-sm"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b"><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker" style="text-align:left">Option</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker" style="text-align:left">Required</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker" style="text-align:left">Description</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker" style="text-align:left">Default</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left"><code>--create-only</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left">Creates a new migration but does not apply it. This also works if you haven&#x27;t made any changes to your schema (in that case, an empty migration is created). Run <code>migrate dev</code> to apply migration.</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left"></td></tr><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left"><code>--name</code> / <code>-n</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left">Name the migration (e.g. <code>prisma migrate dev --name added_job_title</code>)</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left"></td></tr><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left"><code>--help</code> / <code>-h</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left">Displays the help message</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left"></td></tr></tbody></table></div>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-warning border-none text-foreground-warning [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-warning"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p>The <code>--skip-generate</code> and <code>--skip-seed</code> flags were removed in Prisma 7. <code>migrate dev</code> no longer runs <code>prisma generate</code> or seeds automatically. Run them explicitly if needed.</p></div></div>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-ppg text-foreground-ppg border-none [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-ppg"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p>If a <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-migrate/understanding-prisma-migrate/shadow-database#detecting-schema-drift">schema drift</a> is detected while running <code>prisma migrate dev</code> using <code>--create-only</code>, you will be prompted to reset your database.</p></div></div>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="arguments-8"><a data-card="" href="#arguments-8" class="peer">Arguments</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<div class="relative w-full overflow-auto"><table class="w-full caption-bottom text-sm"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b"><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker" style="text-align:left">Argument</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker" style="text-align:left">Required</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker" style="text-align:left">Description</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker" style="text-align:left">Default</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left"><code>--name</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left">The name of the migration. If no name is provided, the CLI will prompt you.</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left"></td></tr><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left"><code>--schema</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left">No</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left">Specifies the path to the desired schema.prisma file to be processed instead of the default path. Both absolute and relative paths are supported.</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default" style="text-align:left"><code>./schema.prisma</code><br/> <code>./prisma/schema.prisma</code></td></tr></tbody></table></div>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="examples-10"><a data-card="" href="#examples-10" class="peer">Examples</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<p>Apply all migrations, then create and apply any new migrations:</p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">prisma</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> migrate</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> dev</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<p>Apply all migrations and create a new migration if there are schema changes, but do not apply it:</p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">prisma</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> migrate</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> dev</span><span style="--shiki-light:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF"> --create-only</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="migrate-reset"><a data-card="" href="#migrate-reset" class="peer"><code>migrate reset</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p><strong>For use in development environments only</strong></p>
<p>This command:</p>
<ol>
<li>Drops the database/schema if possible, or performs a soft reset if the environment does not allow deleting databases/schemas</li>
<li>Creates a new database/schema with the same name if the database/schema was dropped</li>
<li>Applies all migrations</li>
<li>Runs seed scripts</li>
</ol>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-warning border-none text-foreground-warning [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-warning"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p>This command is not supported on <a href="/docs/v6/orm/overview/databases/mongodb">MongoDB</a>. Use <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-migrate/workflows/prototyping-your-schema"><code>db push</code></a> instead.</p></div></div>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="options-7"><a data-card="" href="#options-7" class="peer">Options</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<div class="relative w-full overflow-auto"><table class="w-full caption-bottom text-sm"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b"><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker" style="text-align:left">Option</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker" style="text-align:left">Required</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker" style="text-align:left">Description</th><th <h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="ai-safety-guardrails-for-prisma-migrate-reset"><a data-card="" href="#ai-safety-guardrails-for-prisma-migrate-reset" class="peer">AI Safety guardrails for <code>prisma migrate reset</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<p>Prisma ORM includes built-in safety checks to prevent <strong>accidental destructive commands</strong> when run through AI coding assistants. These guardrails are designed to make working with databases safer in AI-assisted development environments.</p>
<p>The Prisma CLI can detect when it is being invoked by popular AI coding agents such as Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Qwen Code, Cursor, Aider, and Replit.</p>
<p>When one of these agents attempts a destructive action such as <code>prisma migrate reset --force</code>, Prisma ORM blocks execution and shows a protective error message:</p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">Environment</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> variables</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> loaded</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> from</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> .env</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">Prisma</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> schema</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> loaded</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> from</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> prisma/schema.prisma</span></span>

If the user&#x27;s</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> response</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> is</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> ambiguous,</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> you</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> must</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> ask</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> for</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> a</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> clear</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> and</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> explicit</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> confirmation</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8"> (e.g., </span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF">&quot;yes&quot;</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">) before proceeding. None of the user</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF">&#x27;s previous messages before this point may constitute implicit or explicit consent.</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<p>To proceed with the dangerous action, the AI agent will ask you for explicit consent, remind you that the action irreversibly destroys all data, and confirm that the command is being run against a development database. Once you clearly confirm, the AI will set the <code>PRISMA_USER_CONSENT_FOR_DANGEROUS_AI_ACTION</code> environment variable with the exact text of your consent and rerun the command.</p>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="migrate-deploy"><a data-card="" href="#migrate-deploy" class="peer"><code>migrate deploy</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p>The <code>migrate deploy</code> command applies all pending migrations, and creates the database if it does not exist. Primarily used in non-development environments. This command:</p>
<ul>
<li>Does <strong>not</strong> look for drift in the database or changes in the Prisma schema</li>
<li>Does <strong>not</strong> reset the database or generate artifacts</li>
<li>Does <strong>not</strong> rely on a shadow database</li>
</ul>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-warning border-none text-foreground-warning [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-warning"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p>This command is not supported on <a href="/docs/v6/orm/overview/databases/mongodb">MongoDB</a>. Use <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-migrate/workflows/prototyping-your-schema"><code>db push</code></a> instead.</p></div></div>

<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="migrate-resolve"><a data-card="" href="#migrate-resolve" class="peer"><code>migrate resolve</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p>The <code>migrate resolve</code> command allows you to solve migration history issues in production by marking a failed migration as already applied (supports baselining) or rolled back.</p>
<p>Note that this command can only be used with a failed migration. If you try to use it with a successful migration you will receive an error.</p>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-warning border-none text-foreground-warning [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-warning"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p>This command is not supported on <a href="/docs/v6/orm/overview/databases/mongodb">MongoDB</a>. Use <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-migrate/workflows/prototyping-your-schema"><code>db push</code></a> instead.</p></div></div>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="options-9"><a data-card="" href="#options-9" class="peer">Options</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
